name: Magnix — Facebook Page Publish (Postgres → Graph API)

parameters.content:
## Page Publish (P4.3)
- **10h / 14h / 18h VN** · max **3**/lần
- Input: Postgres `content_drafts` via House X cron API
- Due: status=**APPROVED** + FB_PAGE/meta + `scheduled_at` ≤ now
- Env: `CONTENT_PAGE_PUBLISH_ENABLED`, `META_PAGE_*`, `HOUSEX_PUBLIC_URL`, `CRON_SECRET`
- Write-back: POST mark Postgres (metrics Sheet optional)
